title: melicho carneus
intro: Melicho carneus, also known as the "Scarlet Gilia," is a flowering plant species in the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Melicho carneus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to address various health concerns.
